task_body: Ticket T-082: the registrar asks to list the new history course in the fall catalog. The request cites one provenance record. Policy: proceed only when the cited provenance record's stated reach includes every declared dimension of this decision; the named check is the only licensed way to read that record. The submission names the history course only; the physics course is a separate submission. The faculty board is in recess this term; open record questions wait in the draft folder. The prior cycle's filing index was in order.
